elements.name: Claude Code
elements.responsibility: Loads skill bodies on slash-command or auto-trigger; renders them into the agent's context as the next message.
elements.subtitle: agent harness

elements.name: engram CLI binary
elements.responsibility: Go binary that performs recall, learn, list, show, update. Refined in c3-engram-cli-binary.md.
elements.subtitle: recall / learn / list / show / update

elements.name: prepare skill
elements.responsibility: Tells the agent to make 2–3 targeted `engram recall` queries by task and present a summary.
elements.subtitle: briefs the agent before new work

elements.name: learn skill
elements.responsibility: Reviews the recent session for learnable feedback/facts and walks the agent through saving them via `engram learn feedback` / `engram learn fact`.
elements.subtitle: saves session lessons

elements.name: recall skill
elements.responsibility: Calls `engram recall` against the project's session transcripts and surfaces relevant memories.
elements.subtitle: loads prior session context

elements.name: remember skill
elements.responsibility: Captures explicit knowledge the user dictates as feedback or fact memories with user approval, via `engram learn` or `engram update`.
elements.subtitle: explicit-knowledge capture

elements.name: migrate skill
elements.responsibility: Upgrades pre-cfd5fb5 (2026-04-17) flat-format memory files to the current split feedback/fact layout, calling `engram update` to rewrite each file.
elements.subtitle: legacy memory upgrade

elements.name: c4 skill
elements.responsibility: Generates and maintains C4 architecture diagrams under architecture/c4/. Uses targ c4-* targets; does not call the engram binary.
elements.subtitle: architecture diagrams

focus.name: Skills
focus.responsibility: Markdown skill files Claude Code loads on /command or auto-trigger; bodies instruct the agent to call engram subcommands and present results.

name: skills
preamble: Refines L2's E7 Skills container into the six skill markdown files Claude Code loads on slash-command or auto-trigger. Each skill body returns instructions to the agent; most instruct it to shell out to the engram CLI binary. The c4 skill is the exception — it instructs the agent to use targ and edit architecture/c4/ directly, never calling the engram binary.

relationships.description: loads skill body on /command or auto-trigger
instructs agent to call `engram recall` (with --query per topic)
relationships.protocol: Skill body text → agent Bash subprocess

relationships.description: instructs agent to call `engram recall` for prior session context
relationships.protocol: Skill body text → agent Bash subprocess

relationships.description: instructs agent to call `engram learn feedback` / `engram learn fact`
relationships.protocol: Skill body text → agent Bash subprocess

relationships.description: instructs agent to call `engram learn` or `engram update`
relationships.protocol: Skill body text → agent Bash subprocess

relationships.description: instructs agent to read legacy TOML and call `engram update` to rewrite each file
relationships.protocol: Skill body text → agent Bash subprocess
